use_cases: Trigger form submissions with styled primary or destructive buttons
Navigate users through multi-step workflows with ghost or outline button variants
Provide icon-only action buttons for compact UI toolbars
Create accessible interactive controls with built-in keyboard navigation support
Compose complex buttons using the asChild prop with Radix Slot
ai_summary: A versatile, accessible button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon). Built on Radix UI primitives with Tailwind CSS styling, featuring focus-visible ring states, disabled handling, and composition support via the asChild prop. Suitable for any industry requiring standard interactive button controls.
